description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat, multi-level roof and a facade clad in vertical wooden planks. The front showcases a prominent overhang above the entryway, with three tall, narrow windows on the upper section and three larger rectangular windows below. The side and rear elevations have fewer windows, with single square windows providing minimal openings. The roof is dark and appears to be made of metal or composite panels, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The window frames are white, contrasting sharply with the darker wood and roof materials. The overall structure is compact, with clean lines and a minimalist approach to ornamentation.
description: A modern, boxy house with a flat, multi-level dark roof, vertical wood siding, and a mix of tall and square windows. The design is minimalist with strong geometric lines and contrasting white window frames.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, three tall upper windows, and three large lower windows beneath a prominent roof overhang.
description_view_1: Rear view with two single square windows and a clear view of the flat, tiered roof structure.
description_view_2: Front angle highlighting the vertical window arrangement and the layered roof, with the entryway partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite rear angle showing two square windows and the stepped roof design, with minimal window openings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with vertical strips and single square windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway recessed under a deep roof overhang, with a large glass door and no visible steps or porch.
